comment: Host-portable config for agent discovery. Netlify/Cloudflare Pages use public/_headers and public/_redirects instead; this file makes the same Link headers work when deploying to Vercel. Whatever host you use MUST serve these headers for RFC 8288 agent discovery to work.

headers.value: </.well-known/api-catalog>; rel="api-catalog"; type="application/linkset+json", </.well-known/agent-skills/index.json>; rel="service-meta"; type="application/json", </.well-known/mcp/server-card.json>; rel="service-desc"; type="application/json", </.well-known/oauth-protected-resource>; rel="http://openid.net/specs/connect/1.0/issuer"; type="application/json", </auth.md>; rel="service-doc"; type="text/markdown", </how-it-works>; rel="service-doc"; type="text/html"
